personality_one_liner: A highly readable, trustworthy, and single-action-focused interface built for rural and semi-urban Assam users.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room. Minimal visual clutter. One primary action per screen.

do's: Use solid surfaceSecondary instead of glass to ensure maximum legibility and low-end device performance in rural networks.
dont's: Do not use blur or glassmorphism. Performance and absolute legibility take priority.

screens.name: Login
screens.purpose: Secure gateway with role-based entry (Admin/Manager, Agent, Member).

states.error: Readable red text 'Invalid credentials' + Retry button

screens.layout: Full-bleed background image of tea landscape with a gradient scrim (top to bottom, transparent to 90% surfaceInverse). A clean, white surfaceSecondary bottom sheet-like card holding the login form. Clear numeric inputs for Member ID / Agent ID. Large primary CTA button.

screens.name: Dashboard / Home
screens.purpose: A clear overview of overall balance, recent financial activity, and quick access to deposits/loans.

states.loading: Skeleton loaders for balance card and transaction list.
states.empty: Illustration of a passbook + 'No recent transactions. Start by adding a deposit.'
states.error: Error message 'Unable to load dashboard' + Retry button.

screens.layout: Top section: User greeting, role badge, and a prominent 'Total Balance / Total Collection' card inside a brandPrimary container. Quick-action grid below (Send, Collect, Passbook, New Loan). Bottom section: A simple list of recent transactions (merchant/member name, date, amount). Use clear visual hierarchy with high contrast text.

screens.name: Members (List & Detail)
screens.purpose: Manage society members, KYC, and share capital tracking.

states.empty: Illustration of a group + 'No members found in this cluster.'

screens.layout: Search bar pinned to top. List items with Member Initials in a brandTertiary circle, Name, and Member ID. Detail view uses single column layout: Header with Name, followed by cards for 'Share Capital', 'Active Accounts', and 'Nominee Details'. Linear, clean layout without nested tabs.

screens.name: Loans & Deposits
screens.purpose: Track Pigmy/Daily deposits, FDs, and manage loan workflows (EMI, interest).

states.empty: Safe illustration + 'No active loans or deposits.'

screens.layout: Segmented control at the top (Loans | Deposits). Loans view: List of active loans with progress rings showing repayment vs. total. Plain language text for interest ('₹400 total interest'). Deposits view: List of recurring/fixed deposits. Floating Action Button (FAB) for 'New Application'.

screens.name: Collection Agent Field View
screens.purpose: Optimized rapid entry for agents collecting daily deposits in the field.

states.error: 'Network error. Collections will be saved offline.' + Retry.

screens.layout: Extremely utilitarian list. Search/Scan Member ID. Each row has an input field inline or taps into a quick-numpad modal for entering the collected amount. Emphasize offline-first wording. Big sticky 'Submit Daily Ledger' button at the bottom.

empty_finance_safe.alt: Secure cash box with coins representing banking security

empty_tea_plantation.alt: Aerial view of a lush tea plantation

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly avoid any shade of blue, purple, or indigo. Use the provided Moss Green (brandPrimary) and Rust/Ochre (warning) palette. The app should feel earthy, grounded, and representative of Assam.

Prioritize simplicity & single-task focus. For rural users, digital finance causes high cognitive load. Break complex forms into linear steps. Use plain language (e.g., 'Total Interest' instead of complex APR charts).
Ensure high contrast and large text. Target WCAG AA+. Do not rely on icons alone; ALWAYS pair icons with short, clear text labels.
Do NOT use glassmorphism or heavy blurs. This app must perform well on low-end devices and 2G/3G networks in rural Assam. Use solid `surfaceSecondary` with `shadow_tier: 1` for elevation.
Design for offline or flaky networks. Indicate when data is pending sync, especially in the 'Collection Agent Field View'.
Forms must use labels above inputs, never floating labels. Single column layouts only. Ensure primary CTAs are sticky at the bottom.
